allow: PowerShell($ids = @\('2h2s-6bg4','n783-4gmh','is4a-t3qd','xqm5-iybw'\); foreach \($id in $ids\) { Write-Output "=== $id ==="; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://data.novascotia.ca/resource/$id.json?`$limit=2" -TimeoutSec 30; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
